svg.title: kkRepo project architecture and supported repository formats
svg.desc: Diagram showing kkRepo clients, protocol entrypoints, repository formats, Spring Boot replicas, core services, MySQL state, blob storage, and Nexus migration flow.
svg.text: Client-compatible URLs, permissions, migration path, and multi-format repository management
Multi-replica Spring Boot services with shared MySQL coordination
routes client protocol traffic and UI access
Independent adapters for client-visible repository behavior
Auth & permissions | Catalog/search/browse | Migration jobs | TTL cache

text.tspan: Core state is shared; blobs live

svg.text: indexes and node-local caches are rebuildable
Replace the README bullet list with this project map: formats, entrypoints, replicas, shared state, blob stores, UI, and migration in one view.
